2605.04568.title: Dream-MPC: Gradient-Based Model Predictive Control with Latent Imagination
2605.04568.paper_summary: State-of-the-art model-based Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches either use gradient-free, population-based methods for planning, learned policy networks, or a combination of policy networks and planning. Hybrid approaches that combine Model Predictive Control (MPC) with a learned model and a policy prior to leverage the advantages of both paradigms have shown promising results. However, these approaches typically rely on gradient-free optimization methods, which can be computationally expensive for high-dimensional control tasks. While gradient-based methods are a promising alternative, recent works have empirically shown that gradient-based methods often perform worse than their gradient-free counterparts. We propose Dream-MPC, a novel approach that generates few candidate trajectories from a rolled-out policy and optimizes each trajectory by gradient ascent using a learned world model, uncertainty regularization and amortization of optimization iterations over time by reusing previously optimized actions. Our results on 24 continuous control tasks show that Dream-MPC can significantly improve the performance of the underlying policy and can outperform gradient-free MPC and state-of-the-art baselines. We will open source our code and more at https://dream-mpc.github.io.
2605.04568.paper_summary_zh: 最先進的基於模型的強化學習（RL）方法要麼使用無梯度的基於群體的方法進行規劃，要麼使用學習的策略網絡，或者是策略網絡和規劃的組合。結合模型預測控制（MPC）與學習模型和策略先驗的混合方法，利用兩種範式的優勢，已顯示出良好的結果。然而，這些方法通常依賴無梯度的優化方法，這對於高維控制任務來說計算成本可能很高。雖然基於梯度的方法是一個有前景的替代方案，但最近的研究實證表明，基於梯度的方法通常表現不如其無梯度的對應方法。我們提出了Dream-MPC，一種新穎的方法，從展開的策略中生成少量候選軌跡，並通過使用學習的世界模型進行梯度上升來優化每條軌跡，並通過重用先前優化的動作來實現不確定性正則化和優化迭代的攤銷。我們在24個連續控制任務上的結果顯示，Dream-MPC可以顯著提高基礎策略的性能，並且可以超越無梯度MPC和最先進的基準。我們將在https://dream-mpc.github.io上開源我們的代碼和更多內容。
2605.04568.author: Jonathan Spieler et.al.
